compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md and existing docs for polyglot reviewer system
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update CLAUDE.md and any other existing documentation that references Python-specific reviewer behavior or audit commands to reflect the polyglot reviewer system.

Check CLAUDE.md for any notes about ruff/mypy suppression in reviewer agents — update to note the generic replacement. Check if any KNOWN-ISSUES.md entries reference the old Python-specific suppression behavior.

TDD exemption: Criterion 3 — static asset only (documentation files with no conditional logic).

## Files to Modify
- CLAUDE.md (EDIT — if reviewer behavior notes exist)
- .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md (EDIT — if applicable)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No existing documentation describes ruff/mypy suppression in reviewer agents as Python-specific without noting the generic replacement
  Verify: ! grep -rn 'ruff.*suppression\|mypy.*suppression\|ruff.*reviewer\|mypy.*reviewer' CLAUDE.md .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'generic\|configured\|polyglot\|language-neutral'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — No changes needed. CLAUDE.md and KNOWN-ISSUES.md contain no stale Python-specific reviewer suppression references. AC verified: grep returns 0 matches.
comments.author: Test
